mapper.select:
SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS board_id, B.USER_ID AS user_id, B.CATEGORY_ID AS category_id, B.BOARD_TYPE AS board_type, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, NVL(U.NICKNAME, U.USERNAME) AS writer, NVL(B.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS view_cnt, NVL(B.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS like_cnt, NVL(B.REPLY_CNT, 0) AS reply_cnt,
( SELECT LISTAGG(H.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY H.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME) FROM TBL_BOARD_ASPECT A JOIN TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST H ON H.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID = A.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID WHERE A.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND NVL(H.IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y' ) AS hashtags,
B.REG_DATE AS reg_date, B.UPDATE_DATE AS update_date FROM TBL_BOARD B LEFT JOIN TBL_USER U ON U.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE B.BOARD_ID = #{board_id} AND NVL(B.IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT CATEGORY_ID AS category_id, CATEGORY_NAME AS category_name, IS_ACTIVE AS is_active FROM TBL_CATEGORY WHERE CATEGORY_ID = #{category_id} AND NVL(IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y'

SELECT FILE_ID AS file_id, BOARD_ID AS board_id, FILE_SIZE AS file_size, ORIGINAL_NAME AS original_name, SAVED_NAME AS saved_name, CONTENT_TYPE AS content_type, SUB_DIR AS sub_dir, FILE_KIND AS file_kind, IS_ACTIVE AS is_active, IS_THUMBNAIL AS is_thumbnail, REG_DATE AS reg_date, UPDATED_AT AS updated_at FROM TBL_BOARD_FILE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{board_id} AND NVL(IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY FILE_ID ASC

SELECT R.REPLY_ID AS reply_id, R.BOARD_ID AS board_id, R.USER_ID AS user_id, R.PARENT_REPLY_ID AS parent_reply_id, R.CONTENT AS content, NVL(U.NICKNAME, U.USERNAME) AS writer, NVL(R.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS like_cnt, R.REG_DATE AS reg_date FROM TBL_REPLY R LEFT JOIN TBL_USER U ON U.USER_ID = R.USER_ID WHERE R.BOARD_ID = #{board_id} AND R.PARENT_REPLY_ID IS NULL AND NVL(R.IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY R.REPLY_ID DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS board_id, B.TITLE AS title FROM TBL_BOARD B WHERE NVL(B.IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = #{board_type} AND B.BOARD_ID < #{board_id} ORDER BY B.BOARD_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS board_id, B.TITLE AS title FROM TBL_BOARD B WHERE NVL(B.IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = #{board_type} AND B.BOARD_ID > #{board_id} ORDER BY B.BOARD_ID ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LIKE ( LIKE_ID, USER_ID, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( LIKE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{user_id}, 'B', #{board_id}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO TBL_REPORT (REPORT_ID, BOARD_ID, USER_ID, REASON, REG_DATE) VALUES (REPORT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{board_id}, #{user_id}, #{reason}, SYSDATE)
